Appearances:
Plaintiff, Mary Ow is present.
Attorney, Dolores Chong, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Robert Johnson, is present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-13-2010 is vacated.
